items.title: FanDuel to eliminate credit card deposits March 2
items.description: FanDuel Sportsbook will no longer accept deposits by credit cards beginning March 2.

items.title: Falcons' DC 'disappointed' by Pearce arrest news
items.description: Falcons defensive coordinator Jeff Ulbrich said Wednesday that he was "obviously disappointed" by the news of edge rusher James Pearce Jr.'s arrest.
